steps.title: Spot the passage's two-part structure
steps.content: The passage begins with two specific architectural projects as examples of a design trend, then moves to explaining the historical principles and motivations underlying that trend.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
C correctly identifies the passage's structure: examples of a trend, then the principles underlying it.

The others mischaracterize it—
  • A claims unequal impact
  • B frames the explanation as past uses
  • D overstates historical causation
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
